metadata.description: 18 AI skills for the Numeric MCP — purpose-built workflows for accounting teams using the Numeric financial close platform.

plugins.name: numeric-mcp-toolkit
plugins.description: 18 AI skills for the Numeric MCP — close pulse, close retro, flux drafting, accruals, journal entries, rec workbooks, rec-assignment imports, department anomaly scanning, cross-workspace dashboards, audit evidence exports, consolidated flux, financial metrics, clean report exports, executive reports, AR/AP aging, and more.
